description: Last-minute hotel deals — geo search, deals, and markets via HotelTonight's mobile API

tools.name: inventory_search
tools.description: Search last-minute hotel deals near a latitude/longitude for a date range. Required: latitude, longitude. Optional: check_in, check_out, rooms. Returns the Inventory.

params.name: check_in
params.description: Check-in date YYYY-MM-DD (defaults to tonight on the server)

params.name: check_out
params.description: Check-out date YYYY-MM-DD (defaults to tomorrow on the server)

params.name: rooms
params.description: Number of rooms to search for

tools.name: markets_get
tools.description: Get a single market by its numeric id. Required: market_id. Returns the Market.

params.name: market_id
params.description: Numeric market city id (e.g. 1 for San Francisco, 72 for Austin)

tools.name: markets_list
tools.description: List HotelTonight's major markets with location, slug, and category prices. Returns array of Market.

tools.name: markets_nearby
tools.description: List popular/nearby markets for a given market id. Required: market_id. Returns the PopularMarkets.

params.name: market_id
params.description: Numeric market city id to find nearby markets for
